core_interpretation: Immune markers are strongest when cell subsets, cytokines, latent virus markers and symptoms are interpreted together. Cytokines or viral DNA alone are not diagnoses.
guardrails: Do not infer infection from cytokines alone.
Do not infer immune suppression from one low immune cell count.
Do not infer active disease from latent virus DNA alone.
Do not infer fatigue mechanism from immune marker without symptom timing.
Do not treat saliva viral shedding as systemic immune failure.
research_gaps: Limited spaceflight-specific immune dysregulation data compared to terrestrial cohorts.
Need assays distinguishing immune activation from suppression in complex states.
